labApi.title: Is your business visible to AI search?
labApi.subtitle: When someone asks ChatGPT, Perplexity, Claude or Gemini what you sell — can they find you, understand you, and quote you? Audit any page in seconds.
labApi.badge: Free · No signup · No scraping cost
labApi.tryHint: Enter any public URL. Runs on direct page reads — no SerpAPI, no scraping bills.
labApi.errorGeneric: Couldn't audit that URL. Check it's public and reachable, then try again.
labApi.enginesTitle: Can AI engines read this site?
labApi.whatItChecksSub: Four categories, weighted into one score — the same signals AI answer engines use to decide who gets cited.
labApi.cat1Desc: Can GPTBot, ClaudeBot, PerplexityBot and Google-Extended actually reach your pages? robots.txt, llms.txt, sitemap, indexability.
labApi.cat2Desc: Can machines understand what you are? JSON-LD schema, Organization/Person identity, Open Graph, canonical, meta.
labApi.cat3Desc: Will an answer engine quote you? Titles, single H1, question-style headings, content depth, extractable lists and facts.
labApi.cat4Desc: The base the rest stands on: HTTPS, speed, mobile viewport, and — critically — content in raw HTML that JS-only crawlers can see.
labApi.apiSub: One authenticated endpoint. Send a URL, get structured JSON back — score, per-engine access, every check, and prioritized fixes.
labApi.whyBody: AI search is becoming the front door to every business. But most sites are built for humans clicking links, not for machines answering questions. This tells you — precisely — where you're invisible, and exactly how to fix it.
labApi.moreSub: This audit is one of the things I build. The rest are delivered as projects, wired into your stack and documented so you own them.
labApi.ctaTitle: Want this wired into your site?
labApi.ctaBody: A live audit dashboard, scheduled scans, your whole site scored, or AI visibility built into your product — let's scope it.
labApi.footerNote: Built by Elena Revicheva · AIdeazz AI Lab · runs on direct page reads, zero paid scraping

hero.title: Your AI Companion Who Remembers Your Journey
hero.titleSubHighlight: From "A" to "Z" of Your Private AI Space
hero.description: Meet EspaLuz, our live bilingual family tutor helping expat families relocating to LATAM and other Spanish speaking countries thrive into Spanish, on-the-go. EspaLuz is the first in our ecosystem of emotionally intelligent AI companions.

espaluz.title: Meet
espaluz.subtitle: Your bilingual AI family tutor — emotionally intelligent, culturally aware, and ready to help expat families thrive in Spanish-speaking countries.
espaluz.emotionalDescription: EspaLuz isn't just another chatbot. She understands the emotional challenges of cultural adaptation, language barriers, and family transitions. She provides personalized support for both children and adults navigating new environments.
espaluz.functionality1: Accepts voice and text messages in English, Spanish, and Russian, as well as photos from users
espaluz.functionality2: Instantly translates any message into both Spanish and English
espaluz.functionality3: Generates bilingual replies with rich, emotionally aware context
espaluz.functionality4: Creates short avatar videos in Spanish and English — designed to engage children
espaluz.functionality5: Sends voice messages with full bilingual content using AI voice synthesis
espaluz.functionality6: Translates text inside images (OCR) using GPT-4o vision capabilities
espaluz.functionality7: Remembers past conversations and surfaces relevant context in every reply — 2-layer persistent memory: recent history + long-term semantic recall via pgvector RAG (live April 2026)
espaluz.functionality8: Adapts tone based on detected emotions and the user's personal profile
espaluz.telegramDescription: Start your conversation with EspaLuz on Telegram. Experience how she understands your family's unique situation and provides personalized guidance.
espaluz.whatsappLiveDescription: The complete EspaLuz experience — chat directly with our fully operational WhatsApp Tutor! Voice messages, image translation, emotional intelligence, and all premium features are live and ready for your family.
espaluz.webAppDescription: Complete AI language learning platform with voice, video, family profiles, progress tracking, and learning modules. Currently in beta testing—some features may still be refined.

vibeCoding.title: AI-Augmented Development
vibeCoding.subtitle: Production AI systems built with AI — Claude Code, Cursor, LangGraph, and multi-model orchestration compress months of engineering into weeks. The result: a 10-agent ecosystem (9 live 24/7) shipped solo in 15 months for under $15K total infrastructure cost.
vibeCoding.emotionalDescription: AI systems that recognise context and emotional state — not just keywords — enabling agents that respond with genuine relevance rather than generic output.
vibeCoding.adaptiveDescription: Agents that retain context across sessions using pgvector RAG and Oracle Autonomous DB — compounding value with every interaction instead of starting from zero.
vibeCoding.humanDescription: Infrastructure decisions driven by real user needs: multi-platform delivery (WhatsApp, Telegram, X, LinkedIn), bilingual output, and zero-downtime reliability.
vibeCoding.sectionTitle: AI Augmentation → Emotional Intelligence → Adaptive Systems
vibeCoding.sectionSubtitle: AI-augmented development is not just faster code generation — it is a methodology for building systems that understand human context and evolve through real-world use.
vibeCoding.sectionDescription: How the methodology connects to the product:
vibeCoding.card1Description: At its core, AI-augmented development goes beyond code generation. It is:
vibeCoding.card1Point1: • Translating human intent and context into production-grade agent architectures
vibeCoding.card1Point2: • Compressing months of engineering into weeks through intelligent multi-model tooling
vibeCoding.card1Point3: • Building agents that act with context — not just instructions
vibeCoding.card1Conclusion: Combined with persistent memory and structured orchestration, this approach creates AI systems that genuinely evolve alongside their users — verifiable in production today.
vibeCoding.card2Description: A useful AI agent = persistent memory + contextual awareness + adaptive identity.
vibeCoding.card2SubDescription: Agents must be architected to operate:
vibeCoding.card2Point2: • Contextually — retaining and surfacing relevant history
vibeCoding.card2Point3: • Socially — operating across life transitions and multi-platform channels
vibeCoding.card3Description: Building production AI systems grounded in emotional intelligence — agents that understand, remember, and evolve with real human experience across education, automation, and personal productivity.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.subtitle: Transform how humans and AI interact by building emotionally intelligent digital companions that evolve with their users.
vision.missionDescription: To democratize access to emotionally intelligent AI that truly understands human needs, emotions, and growth. We believe AI should amplify human potential, not replace human connection.
vision.impactDescription: Starting with expat families like those helped by EspaLuz, we're expanding to serve anyone navigating life's transitions — students, professionals, families, and communities seeking growth and adaptation.

vision.principle2Description: Built to enhance human relationships and personal growth, not replace them.
vision.principle3Description: AIPAs that learn and adapt through every interaction, becoming more helpful over time.
vision.transformationDescription: In a world of rapid change, we need AI that doesn't just process information — we need AI that helps us navigate the emotional journey of growth, adaptation, and transformation.

platform.title: What is AIdeazz?
platform.subtitle: A modular decentralized platform for crafting, evolving, and monetizing emotionally intelligent AI Personal Assistants (AIPAs).
platform.description1: AIdeazz is more than an AI platform —
platform.description1Detail: it's a complete ecosystem where users can buy, sell, and subscribe to mindful AIPAs tailored to real-life needs.
platform.description2Detail: invites users to not just consume AI — but co-create, rate, upgrade, and evolve AIPAs together.
platform.description3: Dedicated spaces for families, developers, scientists, coaches, and real-world experts
platform.description3Detail: power a collaborative ecosystem where knowledge flows freely.
platform.description4: Every chat, every feature request, every emotional insight
platform.description4Detail: helps AIPAs grow — making them more relevant, more mindful, and more adaptive over time.
platform.marketplaceDescription: Buy, sell, and subscribe to specialized AIPAs. From family tutors to business coaches, find the perfect AI companion for your needs.
platform.socialFiDescription: Co-create and evolve AIPAs with the community. Rate, review, and collaborate to make AI assistants better for everyone.
platform.evolutionDescription: AIPAs learn from every interaction, growing smarter and more emotionally intelligent with each conversation.
platform.web3Description: True ownership of your AI companions through NFTs, decentralized governance, and community-driven development.
platform.modularDescription: Flexible architecture allows for specialized AIPAs in different domains — education, healthcare, business, and beyond.
platform.communityDescription: Dedicated spaces for families, developers, scientists, and coaches to collaborate and share knowledge.
platform.bottomTitle: 🌱 Built Not to Replace People — But to Help Humans Thrive
platform.bottomParagraph1: AIdeazz creates AIPAs — Emotionally Intelligent AI Personal Assistants that help you learn languages, gain new skills, and thrive wherever life takes you.
platform.bottomParagraph2: Life today moves fast — often far from home. Millions are relocating to Latin America (LATAM), where life is warmer, more affordable, and safer amid a changing global landscape. AIPAs are built for expats, travelers, and professionals rebuilding life across borders. They act like trusted companions who remember your story — not just your last chat, but your whole journey — adapting to your mood, goals, and family dynamics.
platform.bottomParagraph3: In LATAM, life happens on the go — in hospitals, local markets, preschools, schools, immigration offices, taxis, and public transport. That's where help is needed most — right here, right now, with a phone in your hand. AIPAs are always there: ready to translate, guide, comfort, and connect. They build bridges between cultures — helping newcomers find belonging, and helping locals reach global opportunities.
platform.bottomParagraph4: Imagine messaging your AIPA when life gets hectic — at a hospital, school, or public office — and receiving help that feels human: accurate, bilingual, and emotionally aware. Like EspaLuz, our first live AIPA on WhatsApp, they translate, teach, and guide with genuine empathy — connecting expats learning Spanish with local professionals improving their English, across 19 Spanish-speaking countries.
platform.bottomParagraph5: Your AIPA evolves with you — learning, growing, and helping you move faster but mindfully. You make confident decisions, adapt with ease, and reconnect with life's rhythm — wherever 'home' becomes next.
platform.bottomParagraph6: The founder of AIdeazz knows this journey intimately — she lived it, as a single mother rebuilding everything from scratch in Panama.
platform.bottomParagraph7: Soon, every AIPA will become a Web3-owned digital companion — an iNFT-powered, evolving AI you truly own, carrying your emotional learning and growth securely with you.

ERC-7857 enables privacy-preserving metadata, dynamic capability evolution, and encrypted emotional context storage — allowing AIPAs to truly evolve while keeping your personal learning data completely secure.

cto.title: CTO AIPA
cto.subtitle: AI Technical Co-Founder
cto.desc: Autonomous AI system for code review, technical decision-making, and daily briefing across 12 active GitHub repos. Three-tier LLM failover (Claude for critical/security → Groq for speed → Grok/xAI fallback) keeps the engine running through any single-provider outage. Persistent memory in Oracle DB, GitHub webhook automation. Voice input pipeline: voice notes → Whisper (with retry + OpenAI fallback) → Oracle knowledge base. Live web layer via Bright Data (Web Unlocker · SERP · Scraping Browser) powers an autonomous Claude research agent — /research_company, /research_employer, /research_competitor — returning verdicts and sendable angles in ~90s. Sprint Briefing Agent (AWS Lambda): EventBridge cron fires 8AM Panama → reads 12 repos' overnight activity + retrieves voice notes from Oracle → Groq clusters signals → Claude writes narrative (4-tier failover: Claude → Groq → Gemini → OpenAI) → OpenAI TTS renders MP3 → delivered to Telegram. Full two-way memory loop. NEW (July 2026): Lead Concierge — a portfolio inquiry becomes a HubSpot contact in seconds, Claude drafts the reply with full portfolio context, and one tap in Telegram sends it from my domain and logs it back onto the CRM record. And because every model id resolves through one fleet-wide switch, provider deprecations (like Groq retiring Llama 3.3 in Aug 2026) are a one-line config swap — never a rewrite.
cto.traction: 12 repos monitored • 25+ code reviews • Lead Concierge: inquiry → AI draft → one-tap send • 3-tier core + 4-tier briefing LLM failover • ~$3/month total • 24/7 uptime · zero crash-restarts
cto.tech: TypeScript, Node.js, Claude, Groq (open-model inference, fleet-wide model switch), Grok (xAI), Bright Data (Web Unlocker/SERP/Scraping Browser), OpenAI TTS/Whisper, Oracle Autonomous Database (mTLS), AWS Lambda, AWS EventBridge, AWS S3, GitHub API, Telegram, PM2

geo.title: GEO + SEO Engine
geo.subtitle: Discoverability for Google, AI answers, and the blog
geo.desc: SEO is the classic piece: a clean map of pages for Google (sitemap, bilingual EN/ES, structured snippets). GEO is the same discipline for AI overviews—accurate facts and authorship on your own domain so assistants can cite you instead of guessing. Automation ties it together: on a schedule, long posts are drafted and published to the off-site blog and mirrored here; optional syndication; every run logged in Oracle. Site forms drop inquiries and campaign tags into the same lead store CMO and CTO already use.
geo.traction: Sitemap + structured pages live • Blog autopilot (opt-in) • Optional syndication • Leads + UTMs in Oracle
geo.tech: Vite, React, bilingual daily blog (aideazz.xyz/blog), Dev.to crosspost, FAQPage JSON-LD (AEO), Claude, Google Search Console (optional), GA4, reCAPTCHA Enterprise, Oracle DB, CTO AIPA cron

cmo.title: CMO AIPA + VibeJobHunter
cmo.subtitle: AI Marketing Co-Founder & Job Hunting Engine
cmo.desc: Two agents in one: (1) Autonomous LinkedIn/Instagram content engine — daily bilingual EN/ES posts via Claude Sonnet 4, Make.com, Buffer. (2) 24/7 job hunting with LangGraph stateful pipeline (live Apr 2026) — 7-node StateGraph (gate → score → route → submit → notify), SQLite checkpointer for deduplication, human-approval interrupt for borderline scores. Scrapes 218 companies across Greenhouse, Lever, Ashby. Claude-powered 100-point scoring. 131-test, 4-layer eval harness at $0.03/run. Verified delivery: real HTTP status + confirmation ID on every ATS submission. Live-web research via Bright Data feeds an autonomous Claude agent that profiles companies and employers on demand.
cmo.traction: 218 companies monitored • 2,500+ jobs evaluated • 131-test eval harness (L4: LLM-as-judge) • LangGraph pipeline live Apr 2026 • Daily bilingual posting
cmo.tech: Python, FastAPI, Claude Sonnet 4, LangGraph, langgraph-checkpoint-sqlite, SQLite, Playwright, Bright Data, Resend, Telegram Bot, Make.com, Buffer API, Oracle Cloud (systemd)

atlas.title: Atlas Shifted AIPA
atlas.subtitle: Autonomous Marketing Strategist — Angle Window Radar
atlas.desc: Watches the public ad market daily, detects which creative angle is opening before it saturates (ENTER / WATCH / AVOID), and generates the evidence-grounded creative — image + real Seedance 2.0 video via the Atuona pipeline. Built on the same Bright Data engine (Web Unlocker · SERP · Scraping Browser) from the Web Data UNLOCKED hackathon, now pointed at live ad-transparency intelligence. Capture-first immutable JSONL log + OpenAI-embedding angle classifier + SQLite projection; 4-tier LLM failover (Claude → Groq → OpenAI → Grok). Public data only — no spend or CTR claimed; window states are ranked hypotheses. Dogfooded on the EspaLuz expat vertical.
atlas.traction: Daily angle time-series across 5 verticals • Live radar dashboard + on-demand whitespace finder • Real Seedance 2.0 video creative • Built for the It's Today Media Build Challenge
atlas.tech: TypeScript, Node.js, Express (SSE), Bright Data (Web Unlocker/SERP/Scraping Browser), OpenAI embeddings + gpt-image-1, Claude/Groq/OpenAI/Grok failover, Runway (Seedance 2.0/Kling 3.0), SQLite, JSONL, PM2 (Oracle), Panama-time cron

espaluz.title: EspaLuz Stack
espaluz.subtitle: Emotionally Intelligent AI Companion — WhatsApp + Telegram + Social Automation
espaluz.desc: Bilingual AI counselor, relocation assistant, and cultural interpreter with family memory — serving expats, travelers, and locals across 21 Spanish-speaking countries. Neural voice messages (edge-tts), real-time translation EN/ES/RU, emotional intelligence (50+ states), OCR photo translation, practical help (banking, medical, schools, emergencies). Unified PostgreSQL memory via LangChain.
espaluz.traction: 3 bots live • 21-country localization • Neural voice • Paying subscribers (PayPal) • 7-platform social auto-posting via Influencer bot

algom.title: ALGOM Alpha

algom.desc: AI-powered Web3 education bot for beginner traders — scam detection, risk management, trading psychology, and technical analysis basics. Autonomous paper trading (zero real money) with real-time data from 5 exchanges, honest reporting of wins and losses on X.
algom.traction: ~200 X followers • 40% educational content rotation • Paper trading with transparent results • Daily auto-posting
algom.tech: Node.js, Eliza OS, Claude Sonnet 4, Groq (open-model inference, fleet-wide model switch), CCXT (5 exchanges), CoinGecko, Twitter API v2, Oracle Cloud (PM2)

Relocated to Panama in 2022 — transitioned from executive management to hands-on AI engineering, shipping a 10-agent ecosystem (9 in production 24/7, AILA in design) solving real problems across language learning, job automation, code review, and content generation.

section3.title: AIdeazz Ecosystem — The Vision
section3.todayNote: The vision I'm building toward — not what I'm selling today. Right now I ship production AI systems for clients and teams, and I'm open to the right role. The ecosystem compounds in the background.
section3.missionLead: <aideazz>AIdeazz</aideazz> is an ecosystem of emotionally intelligent agents — born in Panama and supported by <isd>Innovation Smart District (ISD)</isd>. Our mission is to build conscious AI companions that amplify human potential through education, coaching, and trusted digital assistance.
section3.desc1: AIdeazz is a production ecosystem of context-aware AI agents — built in Panama and backed by Innovation Smart District (ISD). The platform combines persistent memory architectures, multi-model LLM routing, and emotional intelligence to deliver AI assistants that operate across education, automation, and personal productivity.
section3.desc2: Designed not to replace human judgment but to augment it — helping users acquire new skills, make better decisions, and operate faster through personalized AI that retains context over time.
section3.vision: The thesis: every person — professional or not — will eventually need a personal AI agent. Not a generic chatbot, but a persistent, evolving system that understands their context, remembers their history, adapts to real-life challenges, and compounds value over time.

web3.title: In Development: Web3 AI Agent Layer
web3.desc: On-chain agent ownership via ERC-7857 (AI Agents NFT with Private Metadata, Draft standard by 0G Labs) + ERC-6551 token-bound accounts. Portable, tradeable AI agents with encrypted state, dynamic capability evolution, and privacy-preserving transfers across EVM chains.

product1.name: EspaLuz SaaS (Beta)
product1.desc: Full-stack AI language learning platform: React/TypeScript + Supabase + 11 Edge Functions. Multi-modal AI (Claude, Whisper STT, TTS, HeyGen video). PayPal subscriptions, family profiles, 70+ components, i18n (EN/ES/RU), Telegram & WhatsApp bots.

product2.name: Atuona — AI Creative Co-Founder + AI Film Studio + NFT Gallery
product2.desc: Agentic AI creative co-founder behind atuona.xyz — an end-to-end arthouse pipeline: original poetry → bilingual translation → Flux 2 Pro images → multi-provider AI video (Luma Ray-3.2, Runway Gen-4.5, Google Veo 3.1, Kling — operator-selectable with automatic fallback) → free-mint NFTs on Polygon. NEW — a full AI Film Studio (atuona.xyz/aifilmstudio): an ffmpeg compiler that auto-assembles poems into finished films with TTS voiceover, on-screen subtitles, title cards, crossfades and a music bed, streamable from any device. 13-mood emotional engine, persistent creative memory (48+ pages), Claude Opus 4.8 + Flux 2 Pro. Co-authored book published autonomously to blockchain.

journey.step1Desc: Life brings challenges — relocation, language barriers, cultural adaptation. You need help, but generic AI doesn't understand your emotional journey.
journey.step2Desc: You discover an AI companion that truly understands your emotions, remembers your story, and adapts to your family's unique needs.
journey.step3Desc: Your AIPA evolves with you — teaching languages, guiding decisions, providing emotional support when life feels overwhelming.
journey.step4Desc: You've adapted, grown stronger, and built meaningful connections. Your AIPA helped you thrive through transformation.
